title: Database connection pool exhausted
description: PostgreSQL connection pool hit max limit of 100. Applications throwing connection timeout errors. Affected services: orders-api, payments-api.
root_cause: Slow queries holding connections. Missing index on orders.created_at
resolution: Added index, increased pool size to 200, killed long-running queries

title: Memory leak in user-service
description: user-service pod memory climbing steadily over 6 hours. OOMKilled after hitting 2GB limit. Auth failures cascading.
root_cause: Unclosed HTTP client sessions in async handlers
resolution: Patched session cleanup, rolled deployment, added memory alert at 80%

title: Redis cache eviction causing DB overload
description: Redis maxmemory policy set to allkeys-lru. Mass eviction during traffic spike. All requests hitting Postgres directly.
root_cause: Redis memory undersized for peak load. No cache warming strategy.
resolution: Increased Redis memory, switched to volatile-lru, added cache warming on deploy

title: SSL certificate expiry on payments gateway
description: payments.example.com SSL cert expired at 03:00 UTC. Checkout flow broken for all users. Revenue impact.
root_cause: Certificate renewal cron job failed silently 30 days prior
resolution: Renewed cert manually, fixed cron, added 30/7/1 day expiry alerts

title: Kafka consumer lag spike
description: Notifications consumer group lag reached 2M messages. Push notifications delayed by 4+ hours.
root_cause: Downstream email provider rate-limiting causing consumer to slow down
resolution: Added provider circuit breaker, scaled consumer replicas from 2 to 8

title: Kubernetes pod crash loop on checkout service
description: checkout-service pods entering CrashLoopBackOff after deployment. Liveness probe failing. 100% error rate on checkout.
root_cause: New environment variable DATABASE_URL missing from deployment config
resolution: Added missing env var to Kubernetes secret, redeployed, added config validation on startup

title: Disk space exhaustion on logging server
description: Logging server disk at 100%. Log ingestion stopped. Application logs lost. Monitoring alerts silenced.
root_cause: Log rotation policy disabled after last config change. Logs accumulated for 3 weeks.
resolution: Cleared old logs, re-enabled rotation, set 80% disk alert, moved to log shipping to S3

title: API rate limiting causing customer failures
description: Third-party payment processor returning 429 Too Many Requests. 30% of payment attempts failing during peak hours.
root_cause: No rate limiting on our side. Traffic spike caused by marketing campaign exceeded provider limits.
resolution: Implemented token bucket rate limiter, added request queuing, negotiated higher limits with provider

title: DNS resolution failure in production
description: Internal services unable to resolve each other. Service mesh broken. All inter-service calls failing with NXDOMAIN.
root_cause: CoreDNS config overwritten during Kubernetes upgrade. Custom DNS entries lost.
resolution: Restored CoreDNS configmap from backup, added DNS config to GitOps repo, added DNS smoke tests

title: S3 bucket permissions misconfiguration
description: User profile images returning 403 Forbidden. Image upload endpoint returning 500. All new user signups broken.
root_cause: IAM policy rotation removed s3:PutObject and s3:GetObject permissions from app role
resolution: Restored IAM permissions, added IAM policy tests to CI pipeline, added permission validation on deploy

title: High CPU on search service
description: search-service CPU at 98% for 2 hours. Response times degraded from 120ms to 8000ms. Search results timing out.
root_cause: Elasticsearch query missing index. Full table scan triggered by new wildcard search feature.
resolution: Added composite index for search fields, added query timeout of 2s, added query explain logging

title: Deployment rollback required after bad migration
description: Database migration added NOT NULL column without default. Existing rows failing validation. API returning 500 on all reads.
root_cause: Migration not tested against production data volume. Dev database had no existing rows.
resolution: Rolled back migration, added DEFAULT value, re-ran migration with zero downtime strategy

title: Message queue deadlock
description: RabbitMQ queue depth growing unbounded. Consumers stuck. 45 minute processing backlog building up.
root_cause: Consumer holding message lock while waiting for DB response. DB timeout causing lock to never release.
resolution: Set message acknowledgement timeout, added dead letter queue, fixed DB connection timeout

title: CDN misconfiguration serving stale content
description: Users seeing outdated UI after frontend deployment. Cache-Control headers set to max-age=86400. New JS files not loading.
root_cause: CDN cache invalidation not triggered as part of deployment pipeline
resolution: Added CDN invalidation step to CI/CD, set immutable caching on hashed assets, short TTL on index.html

title: gRPC service timeout cascade
description: inventory-service gRPC calls timing out after 500ms. Callers retrying aggressively. Thundering herd causing total service failure.
root_cause: Default gRPC timeout too low. Retry logic without backoff amplified load 10x.
resolution: Increased timeout to 5s, added exponential backoff, added circuit breaker to stop cascade

title: JWT secret rotation breaking auth
description: All users suddenly logged out. All API calls returning 401 Unauthorized. Auth service rejecting all tokens.
root_cause: JWT secret rotated in production without invalidating existing sessions or supporting dual secrets during transition
resolution: Restored old secret temporarily, implemented dual-secret validation during rotation window, gradual rollout

title: Elasticsearch index corruption
description: Search returning incomplete results. Some documents missing from index. Index health showing RED status.
root_cause: Shard allocation failed during node restart. Unassigned shards causing partial index.
resolution: Force-allocated unassigned shards, triggered reindex from primary store, added shard health monitoring

title: Load balancer health check misconfigured
description: Load balancer routing traffic to unhealthy instances. 40% of requests failing. Instances showing healthy in LB but returning 500.
root_cause: Health check endpoint returning 200 even when database connection was unavailable
resolution: Fixed health check to validate DB connectivity, added deep health check endpoint, updated LB config

title: Cron job running duplicate payments
description: Payment processing cron ran twice due to daylight saving time change. Customers charged twice. Finance alerted.
root_cause: Cron schedule in local timezone. DST caused job to execute at same UTC time twice.
resolution: Migrated all cron schedules to UTC, added idempotency key on payment processor, added duplicate payment detection

title: Container registry pull rate limit
description: Kubernetes pods failing to start. ImagePullBackOff on all new deployments. Docker Hub rate limit hit.
root_cause: Anonymous pulls from Docker Hub hitting 100 pulls/6hr limit during scaling event
resolution: Added Docker Hub credentials to Kubernetes pull secret, migrated critical images to private ECR registry

title: Database replica lag causing stale reads
description: Users seeing outdated order status after updates. Reads going to replica lagging 45 seconds behind primary.
root_cause: Long-running analytics query on replica blocking replication thread
resolution: Killed analytics query, routed analytics to dedicated read replica, added replica lag alert at 5s

title: Secret manager quota exceeded
description: Application unable to fetch secrets at startup. AWS Secrets Manager returning ThrottlingException. Services failing to start.
root_cause: Each pod fetching secrets individually on startup. 50 pod scaling event caused 500 simultaneous API calls.
resolution: Implemented secrets caching with TTL, used init container to fetch once per node, requested quota increase

title: Network partition between availability zones
description: Services in AZ-1 unable to reach services in AZ-2. 50% of requests failing. Database writes succeeding but reads failing.
root_cause: AWS security group rule change blocked cross-AZ traffic on port 8080
resolution: Restored security group rule, added network connectivity tests to monitoring, added change approval for SG rules

title: Webhook delivery failures
description: Customer webhooks failing to deliver. Retry queue backing up with 100k undelivered events. Customers not receiving order updates.
root_cause: Customer endpoint SSL certificate expired. Our webhook service failing silently on SSL errors.
resolution: Added SSL validation error logging, implemented dead letter queue for failed webhooks, added customer notification for failed endpoints

title: Terraform state lock not released
description: All infrastructure deployments blocked. Terraform reporting state lock held by previous run. Team unable to deploy any changes.
root_cause: Terraform apply interrupted mid-run by CI timeout. DynamoDB lock not released on failure.
resolution: Manually released DynamoDB lock, verified infrastructure consistency, added CI timeout of 45min with lock release on failure

title: API gateway timeout on file upload endpoint
description: Large file uploads failing with 504 Gateway Timeout. Files under 5MB succeeding. Files over 5MB failing at exactly 29 seconds.
root_cause: API gateway default timeout of 29 seconds. Large uploads exceeding limit.
resolution: Increased gateway timeout to 120s for upload endpoint, implemented multipart upload, added progress indicator

title: Full text search degraded after index rebuild
description: Search relevance severely degraded after nightly index rebuild. Irrelevant results appearing at top. Customer complaints spike.
root_cause: Index rebuild overwrote custom analyzer settings. Default analyzer used instead of custom tokenizer.
resolution: Restored index settings from backup, added index settings to version control, added relevance regression tests

title: Background job queue flooding
description: Email sending job queue reached 1 million pending jobs. Email delivery delayed by 8 hours. New jobs not being processed.
root_cause: Email provider outage caused jobs to fail and requeue infinitely without backoff. No max retry limit.
resolution: Added max retry of 5 with exponential backoff, added dead letter queue, added queue depth alert at 10k

title: Kubernetes node not ready
description: 3 out of 10 nodes showing NotReady status. Pods being evicted and rescheduled constantly. Service instability.
root_cause: Node disk pressure due to accumulated container image layers. kubelet unable to run.
resolution: Ran docker image prune on affected nodes, added node disk alert at 70%, set imagePullPolicy to IfNotPresent

title: OAuth token endpoint returning 500
description: All OAuth login flows broken. Users unable to sign in. Third-party integrations all failing. Token refresh also broken.
root_cause: Redis used for token storage hit maxmemory limit. New token writes failing silently.
resolution: Increased Redis memory limit, added eviction policy noeviction for auth Redis, added token write error alerting
